<!--
Thanks for sending a PR. Fill in what's relevant; delete what isn't.
-->

## Summary

<!-- One paragraph: what changes, why. Don't paste the diff. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (no API change)
- [ ] Feature (CLI or framework surface)
- [ ] Refactor / internal only
- [ ] Docs / tests / tooling
- [ ] Breaking change (call out the migration)

## Linked issues / RFDs

<!-- e.g. Closes #123, implements RFD-0004, follows up #456 -->

## Test plan

<!--
How a reviewer can verify this locally. Commands, expected output,
edge cases checked. "Tests pass" is not a test plan.
-->

- [ ] `go test -race ./...`
- [ ] `golangci-lint run ./...`
- [ ] `bash scripts/release-checklist.sh` (if release-affecting)
- [ ] Other:

## Notes for the reviewer

<!--
Anything not obvious from the diff: tricky trade-offs, things you
tried and rejected, planned follow-ups, screenshots if UX changed.
-->
